Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Imposing Terminating Sanction Agaist Pltfs For Failure To Obey Court Order Compelling Pltf'S Physicalf Examination
Off Calendar Nov-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:

John B. Cesari, Esq., for Loretta Lim, Defendant/Moving Party
Paul J. Steiner, Esq., for Jamize R. Olawale, Plaintiff/Opposing Party

Hearing held: Terminating sanctions is Denied. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for his examination no later than January 31, 2007. Plaintiff is ordered to pay the costs of his examination. Further sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Imposing Terminating Sanction Agaist Pltfs For Failure To Obey Court Order Compelling Pltf'S Physicalf Examination
Off Calendar Oct-20-2006 Continued To Nov-02-06 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 612
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Loretta Lim's Motion for order imposing terminating sanction against plaintiffs for failure to obey court order compelling plaintiff's physical examination is continued to November 2, 2006 at 09:00 A.M. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2006 Continued To Dec-07-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Motion To Compel Compliance With Demand For Physical Exam Of Pltf
Off Calendar Apr-05-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendants Loretta Lim, Timberlake Forrest, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Compliance With Demand For Physical Examination of Plaintiff is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for an Independent Medical Examination to be scheduled by Defendant on a date no sooner than May 22, 2006. Plaintiff's failure to appear at his previously noticed examination was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are imposed against Plaintiff in the amount of $1,240, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
